title: Accessing Android External Storage: Security Sensitive
description: Storing data locally on Android devices can be a common task for mobile applications. However, using the external file storage can pose security risks as files created on the external storage are globally readable and writable. A malicious application could try to read sensitive information from the files that other applications have stored on the external storage.
recommendation: Avoid using external storage for sensitive data.
impact: Potential exposure of sensitive data to malicious applications.
